Program
  ProgramHead
    PROGRAM: program
    ID: test
  DeclarePart
    TypeDecPart
      TypeDec
        TYPE: type
        TypeDecList
          ID: t1
          =: =
          TypeDef
            BaseType
              INTEGER: integer
          ;: ;
          TypeDecList
            ID: t2
            =: =
            TypeDef
              BaseType
                CHAR: char
            ;: ;
            TypeDecList
              ID: arr
              =: =
              TypeDef
                StructureType
                  ArrayType
                    ARRAY: array
                    [: [
                    INTC: 1
                    ..: ..
                    INTC: 10
                    ]: ]
                    OF: of
                    BaseType
                      INTEGER: integer
              ;: ;
              TypeDecList
                ID: rec
                =: =
                TypeDef
                  StructureType
                    RecType
                      RECORD: record
                      FieldDecList
                        BaseType
                          INTEGER: integer
                        IDList
                          ID: name
                        ;: ;
                        FieldDecList
                          BaseType
                            CHAR: char
                          IDList
                            ID: grade
                          ;: ;
                      END: end
                ;: ;
    VarDecPart
      VarDec
        VAR: var
        VarDecList
          TypeDef
            BaseType
              INTEGER: integer
          VarIDList
            ID: i
            VarIDMore
              ,: ,
              VarIDList
                ID: j
          ;: ;
          VarDecList
            TypeDef
              BaseType
                CHAR: char
            VarIDList
              ID: c
            ;: ;
            VarDecList
              TypeDef
                ID: t1
              VarIDList
                ID: x
              ;: ;
              VarDecList
                TypeDef
                  ID: arr
                VarIDList
                  ID: a
                ;: ;
                VarDecList
                  TypeDef
                    ID: rec
                  VarIDList
                    ID: r
                  ;: ;
  ProgramBody
    BEGIN: begin
    StmList
      Stm
        InputStm
          READ: read
          (: (
          ID: i
          ): )
      StmMore
        ;: ;
        StmList
          Stm
            ID: j
            AssignmentRest
              :=: :=
              Exp
                Term
                  Factor
                    Variable
                      ID: i
                OtherTerm
                  AddOp
                    +: +
                  Exp
                    Term
                      Factor
                        INTC: 1
          StmMore
            ;: ;
            StmList
              Stm
                ID: x
                AssignmentRest
                  :=: :=
                  Exp
                    Term
                      Factor
                        Variable
                          ID: i
                      OtherFactor
                        MultOp
                          *: *
                        Term
                          Factor
                            Variable
                              ID: j
                    OtherTerm
                      AddOp
                        +: +
                      Exp
                        Term
                          Factor
                            INTC: 2
              StmMore
                ;: ;
                StmList
                  Stm
                    ID: a
                    AssignmentRest
                      VariMore
                        [: [
                        Exp
                          Term
                            Factor
                              INTC: 1
                        ]: ]
                      :=: :=
                      Exp
                        Term
                          Factor
                            Variable
                              ID: x
                  StmMore
                    ;: ;
                    StmList
                      Stm
                        ID: r
                        AssignmentRest
                          VariMore
                            .: .
                            FieldVar
                              ID: name
                          :=: :=
                          Exp
                            Term
                              Factor
                                Variable
                                  ID: i
                      StmMore
                        ;: ;
                        StmList
                          Stm
                            ID: r
                            AssignmentRest
                              VariMore
                                .: .
                                FieldVar
                                  ID: grade
                              :=: :=
                              Exp
                                Term
                                  Factor
                                    Variable
                                      ID: c
                          StmMore
                            ;: ;
                            StmList
                              Stm
                                ConditionalStm
                                  IF: if
                                  RelExp
                                    Exp
                                      Term
                                        Factor
                                          Variable
                                            ID: i
                                    OtherRelE
                                      CmpOp
                                        <: <
                                      Exp
                                        Term
                                          Factor
                                            Variable
                                              ID: j
                                  THEN: then
                                  StmList
                                    Stm
                                      OutputStm
                                        WRITE: write
                                        (: (
                                        Exp
                                          Term
                                            Factor
                                              Variable
                                                ID: i
                                        ): )
                                  ELSE: else
                                  StmList
                                    Stm
                                      OutputStm
                                        WRITE: write
                                        (: (
                                        Exp
                                          Term
                                            Factor
                                              Variable
                                                ID: j
                                        ): )
                                  FI: fi
                              StmMore
                                ;: ;
                                StmList
                                  Stm
                                    LoopStm
                                      WHILE: while
                                      RelExp
                                        Exp
                                          Term
                                            Factor
                                              Variable
                                                ID: i
                                        OtherRelE
                                          CmpOp
                                            <: <
                                          Exp
                                            Term
                                              Factor
                                                INTC: 10
                                      DO: do
                                      StmList
                                        Stm
                                          ID: i
                                          AssignmentRest
                                            :=: :=
                                            Exp
                                              Term
                                                Factor
                                                  Variable
                                                    ID: i
                                              OtherTerm
                                                AddOp
                                                  +: +
                                                Exp
                                                  Term
                                                    Factor
                                                      INTC: 1
                                      ENDWH: endwh
                                  StmMore
                                    ;: ;
                                    StmList
                                      Stm
                                        OutputStm
                                          WRITE: write
                                          (: (
                                          Exp
                                            Term
                                              Factor
                                                Variable
                                                  ID: x
                                          ): )
    END: end
  .: .
